name: ai-image-to-saas-product-generator
description: Run backend + frontend together so Next can reach Express on :8080

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix gemini-image-to-react-backend" "wait-on -t 120000 -i 300 -w 400 http://127.0.0.1:8080/health && npm run dev --prefix frontend"
